title: Tender Fermented Raspberries Dessert
description: This tender fermented raspberries dessert is a delightful and romantic Ukrainian dish that combines the tangy sweetness of ripe raspberries with a dairy-free-friendly touch.

ingredients.name: Almond Milk (or any preferred plant-based milk)

instructions: Wash the raspberries thoroughly and remove any stems or leaves. Rinse agar-agar in cold water to remove its natural sweetness.
Place the washed raspberries in a blender with agar-agar, honey/maple syrup, vanilla extract, and almond milk. Blend until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a pot and bring it to a gentle boil over medium heat while stirring continuously to prevent burning.
Once boiling, reduce the heat to low and simmer for about 15 minutes, or until thickened and fully fermented. Stir occasionally during this time.
Strain the mixture through a fine mesh sieve to remove any solids and cool slightly before serving.
